title: Tamil Nadu Court Defers Divorce Case Of TVK Chief Vijay, His Wife Sangeetha To Mid-June
description: Vijay and Sangeetha met for the first time in 1996. A Sri Lankan, Sangeetha, was brought up in Britain. The couple registered their marriage in 1998 in the UK, following which they also held a ceremonial marriage as per Hindu traditions in Chennai on August 25, 1999
